summary: Led modernization of legacy banking systems into containerized microservices with improved maintainability and deployment workflows.
highlights: Migrated legacy monolithic applications to Java 17 Spring Boot microservices.
Designed and implemented secure RESTful APIs for backend integration and user management.
Containerized backend, frontend, and Oracle DB using Docker Compose for consistent deployments.
Replaced legacy ORM framework with Hibernate JPA, improving maintainability and performance.

summary: Developed serverless backend services for a real-time feedback and staff monitoring platform using AWS cloud-native architecture.
highlights: Designed and implemented serverless architecture using API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, SES, and EventBridge.
Built REST APIs for integration with frontend systems and monitoring dashboards.
Designed DynamoDB schemas for scalable tracking of staff activities and feedback data.
Applied Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with version-controlled deployments and automated testing.

summary: Led large-scale migration of batch processing systems to a cloud-based file transfer platform with improved reliability and testability.
highlights: Migrated 200+ Spring Batch jobs from legacy GPC system to Cloud File Transfer (CFT) platform.
Developed reusable tasklets for encryption/decryption, remote execution, and SFTP integration.
Built Docker-based local simulation environment for production-like testing and debugging.
Coordinated integration testing, UAT, and production rollout with multiple external systems.

summary: Maintained and modernized critical backend systems with focus on reliability, security, and long-term maintainability.
highlights: Upgraded legacy backend systems to align with new infrastructure and security requirements.
Migrated Java components to newer frameworks and versions.
Implemented security and compliance enhancements for production systems.

summary: Developed enterprise integration workflows for data exchange between legacy and modern systems.
highlights: Designed and deployed integration workflows for cross-system data exchange.
Optimized transformation logic and exception handling for reliability and throughput.

summary: Built enterprise integration solutions supporting data transformation across core business systems.
highlights: Developed transformation logic and message mappings across enterprise systems.
Supported data exchange workflows between multiple business platforms.
